improvement: Bound Cloudflare deployment verification by response media type, declared size, actual UTF-8 body size, HTTP status, and research-surface identity markers.

verification.runtime: Node.js isolated local execution using byte-identical contract and test contents before commit
cases: bounded HTML with all research markers accepted
non-HTML response rejected despite marker presence
invalid status and missing identity markers preserved as separate reasons

workflow_binding: .github/workflows/cloudflare-pages-research.yml invokes verify-deployment.mjs after a successful Wrangler deployment and records its NDJSON output in the deployment proof packet.
trust_limits: This does not prove that Cloudflare credentials are configured.
This does not prove that a public hostname currently resolves.
This does not cryptographically prove the response originated from Cloudflare.
Marker presence proves only the committed identity contract, not scientific truth or medical validity.
privacy_boundary: Public source and deployment metadata only; no credentials, account identifiers, private chat, health material, diagnosis, or treatment claims.
